UpdateDedicatedGateway.etGatewayId: The ID of the dedicated gateway
UpdateDedicatedGateway.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md)
UpdateDedicatedGateway.name: The name of the dedicated gateway, consisting of uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_ /., must start with a letter, length 1-65
UpdateDedicatedGateway.speed: Bandwidth limit of the dedicated gateway, in Mbps. Must be an integer between 2 and 100000
UpdateDedicatedGateway.description: The description of the dedicated gateway, no more than 200 characters
UpdateDedicatedGateway.localCidrs: IPv4 cloud-side network of the dedicated gateway. Users can select the current VPC CIDR block or customize one or more CIDR blocks
UpdateDedicatedGateway.enableIpv6: Whether IPv6 is enabled: 1 for enabled, 0 for disabled. IPv6 is a whitelist feature
UpdateDedicatedGateway.ipv6LocalCidrs: IPv6 cloud-side network of the dedicated gateway. Users can select the current VPC CIDR block or customize one or more IPv6 CIDR blocks
